query:
SELECT
                    id                  AS "id!: Uuid",
                    project_id          AS "project_id!: Uuid",
                    agent_id,
                    issue_id,
                    created_by_user_id,
                    title,
                    external_agent_id,
                    created_at          AS "created_at!: DateTime<Utc>",
                    updated_at          AS "updated_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
                FROM copilot_sessions
                WHERE project_id = $1 AND agent_id IS NULL
                ORDER BY updated_at DESC
